reasoning: The Lean formalization correctly encodes the informal statement. The nested unions `⋃ (a : ℚ) (b : ℚ) (_ : a < b), {Set.Ioo (a : ℝ) b}` enumerate exactly the open intervals in ℝ with rational endpoints a < b. `Set.image2 (fun s t => s ×ˢ t)` applied to this set and itself produces precisely `{Ioo ↑a ↑b ×ˢ Ioo ↑c ↑d | a,b,c,d : ℚ, a < b, c < d}`, matching the informal collection. `TopologicalSpace.IsTopologicalBasis` on `ℝ × ℝ` (carrying the standard product topology) asserts exactly what Munkres means by "basis for ℝ²": the collection covers the space, satisfies the directed intersection axiom, and generates the ambient topology. The "countable" adjective is a trivial consequence of the ℚ-indexing and not a separate claim. Types, quantifier structure, and the ambient space all match.
